name: Byrider Greenwood
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in Greenwood, IN offering in-house financing for all credit types, with on-site inspection, warranty, and service department.
description_long:
Byrider Greenwood is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) used car dealership located at 1703 U.S. 31 S. in Greenwood, Indiana. It operates as part of the broader Byrider network, which markets itself as having helped over one million drivers get into vehicles. The dealership offers both vehicle sales and in-house financing under one roof, targeting consumers who may struggle to obtain traditional auto loans through banks or credit unions.

The dealership sells used vehicles across a range of makes and models — primarily cars, SUVs, and trucks from the 2011–2017 model years with mileage ranging from roughly 98,000 to 166,000 miles. Financing is handled directly on-site rather than through third-party lenders. A sample deal disclosed on the site shows 40 monthly payments at 21% APR per $1,000 financed. Buyers can apply online or in person, and trade-ins are accepted and can be applied toward a down payment.

What separates Byrider Greenwood from a typical used lot is its stated post-sale infrastructure. Every vehicle is put through a detailed inspection process before being offered for sale, and all purchases include a limited warranty. An optional service contract is also available. The dealership operates its own on-site service department (Monday–Friday, 8am–5pm), which means buyers can return for maintenance or repairs rather than being left without support after the sale. Sales staff handle both the vehicle transaction and the financing application.

Byrider Greenwood fills a specific gap in the consumer finance market: it provides access to transportation and credit for buyers who have been turned away by conventional lenders. However, the trade-offs are real. The 21% APR sample rate is significantly above prime auto loan rates. The inventory skews older and high-mileage, which increases the risk of mechanical issues even with a warranty. Consumers with improving credit should compare this option against credit unions, BHPH alternatives, and any subprime auto lenders before committing.
pros: In-house financing available for all credit situations including bad and no credit
Every vehicle goes through a documented multi-point inspection process before sale
Limited warranty included with every vehicle purchase at no extra cost
Optional service contract available for extended coverage beyond the warranty
Trade-in accepted and can be used as a down payment to reduce out-of-pocket costs
On-site service department open Monday–Friday for post-purchase maintenance and repairs
Online pre-approval application available before visiting the lot
cons: Sample APR of 21% is high — well above prime or even subprime auto loan rates from banks and credit unions
Inventory consists entirely of older, high-mileage used vehicles (most 2011–2017, 98K–166K miles)
Financing terms are set by the dealer rather than a competitive lending market, limiting negotiating power
No Sunday hours and Saturday closes at 4pm, limiting access for full-time workers
No pricing displayed in inventory listings — total cost of ownership is not transparent online
best_for: Buyers with bad or no credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank or credit union auto financing
First-time car buyers who need both a vehicle and financing arranged in a single visit
Consumers who need reliable transportation quickly and want same-day on-site approval
People rebuilding credit who need a vehicle as a practical necessity, not a preference
diagnosis: Byrider Greenwood is best for buyers with damaged or no credit who need reliable transportation and cannot qualify for financing elsewhere — it combines the vehicle purchase and loan in one place with no third-party approval required. The main caveat is cost: the sample 21% APR and older high-mileage inventory make this a high-price option, and consumers with any ability to qualify for a credit union auto loan should exhaust that route first.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Used vehicle sales (cars, SUVs, trucks, vans)
Vehicle trade-in with offer in minutes
Limited warranty included with every purchase
Credit application for all credit types including bad credit
Down payment flexibility with trade-in credit
